---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "It would be great if I could [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Example Usage

If applicable, show how the feature would be used:

```python
from constraint_theory import PythagoreanManifold

# Example of how the new feature might work
manifold = PythagoreanManifold(density=200)
# ... new functionality ...
```

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Impact

- [ ] This would be a breaking change
- [ ] This is a performance improvement
- [ ] This improves the API ergonomics
- [ ] This adds new functionality

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear problem statement
- [ ] I have included example usage if applicable
